name: doh-resolver
note: DNS-over-HTTPS resolver reachability check. Reads the LIVE ServerConfig.doh_resolver URL (the panel-editable value, NOT the .env default) and dispatches an RFC 8484 binary DoH query for `example.com IN A`. Verifies the resolver responds AND returns at least one answer record (catches captive portals / transparent DNS poisoners that 200-OK reachability checks would silently pass). For operators in censored regions where Cloudflare DoH (1.1.1.1) is blocked, switching to a regional DoH endpoint via the panel form and re-running `ct-server-core component check` is the documented adapt path. Without this check, sing-box's DNS path looks healthy at the connection layer but every name lookup fails — a classic half-broken-proxy diagnostic dead-end. (v0.0.22 — 2026 Milestone Closing.)
